name: lint
description: Run clang-format and clang-tidy checks on C++ sources

steps.command: find src tests include -type f \( -name '*.cpp' -o -name '*.h' -o -name '*.hpp' -o -name '*.cc' -o -name '*.cxx' \) 2>/dev/null | sort
find src tests include -type f \( -name '*.cpp' -o -name '*.h' -o -name '*.hpp' -o -name '*.cc' -o -name '*.cxx' \) 2>/dev/null | sort
